input: Hi, I'd like to return my Collagen Peptides order (#1029). I opened it and tried it for a few days but it's just not working for me. Can I get a refund?
output:
Hi Sam,

Thank you for reaching out about your Collagen Peptides from order #1029.

I completely understand wanting to make sure our products are the right fit for you. Unfortunately, since your order was delivered on January 15th, it's now outside our 30-day return window, so we're unable to process a return at this time.

I know this isn't the answer you were hoping for, and I genuinely wish I could make an exception. Our return policy helps us maintain the quality and freshness of our supplements for all customers.

If you have any questions about how to best incorporate the Collagen Peptides into your routine or would like suggestions for other products that might be a better match, I'm here to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if there's anything else I can assist you with.

Vitalize Support
